messaging.title: Message Roles Configuration
messaging.subtitle: Configure which roles are allowed in chat messages. Core roles can be hidden but not deleted (they remain valid for backend validation).
messaging.infoMessage: These roles will be available when creating chat messages. Each role can have a custom emoji for visual identification. Core roles can be hidden but not deleted (they remain valid for backend validation).
messaging.emojiHelper: Single emoji character for visual identification
messaging.npcCountHelper: Choose how many clones of this role should appear in SwarmDesk (0-5).
messaging.npcColorHelper: Used for the NPC body glow and sidebar identity color.
messaging.npcRoleHelper: Shown above the NPC in SwarmDesk. Leave blank to use the display label.
messaging.npcPersonalityHelper: Controls the default vibe and fallback dialogue for this NPC.
messaging.duplicateRoleId: A tactical role with this callsign is already assigned.
messaging.duplicateAgentId: An operative with this callsign is already deployed.

swarmdesk.movementDescription: Adjust camera movement speeds for Orbital and FPS modes in SwarmDesk 3D environment.

swarmdesk.fpsDescription: Controls camera movement when using first-person navigation.

instructions.title: How to use:
instructions.step1: Install the UML generator: npm install -g @madnessengineering/uml-generator
instructions.step2: Generate UML from your codebase: uml-generator /path/to/project -o project-uml.json
instructions.step3: Upload the generated JSON file using the button above

complete.message: Boot camp is over. Lock and load, commander. The grid awaits your orders.

welcome.title: Welcome to Hangar Bay
welcome.description: Inventorium is your AI-powered tactical management and battlefield visualization platform.
welcome.subtitle: Commencing tactical briefing. Stand by for system check.

projects-overview.title: Mech Operations
projects-overview.description: Organize your mission objectives into mech units for optimized fleet management and tactical visualization.
projects-overview.hint: 💡 Tactical Note: Every mission belongs to a unit

create-project.title: Register New Unit
create-project.description: Let's register a new mobile suit to organize your operations. Units help you group related missions together.
create-project.step1: Engage the floating '+' button in the bottom right corner
create-project.step2: Select the 'Mech Unit' tab in the interface
create-project.step3: Enter a unique unit ID (lowercase with hyphens, e.g., 'rx-78-01')
create-project.step4: Add a designation and technical specs
create-project.hint: Tip: Unit IDs must be unique and use lowercase alphanumeric characters

add-todo.title: Add Mission Objective
add-todo.description: Now let's add a mission objective to your unit. These are the tactical goals for your sortie.
add-todo.step2: Select the 'Mission' tab in the interface
add-todo.step4: Select your unit from the dropdown
add-todo.hint: Tip: You can deploy missions from any command terminal using the '+' button

configure-ai.title: Deploy AI Tactical Advisor
configure-ai.description: Enhance combat readiness by integrating an AI advisor such as Google Gemini or OpenAI.
configure-ai.statusConfigured: Status: ✅ AI advisor deployed and combat-ready!
configure-ai.helpText: AI advisor can be deployed anytime via Settings → AI Configuration

ai-assistant.title: AI Tactical Copilot
ai-assistant.description: Deploy your AI copilot to manage sorties, analyze combat data, and enhance mission efficiency.
ai-assistant.hint: 💡 Tactical Note: Access cockpit interface to engage

swarmdesk.description: Explore your codebase in 3D tactical view - an immersive battlefield visualization tool.
